name: Impossible Crustless Spinach Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. (10-ounce package) frozen chopped spinach; thawed and pressed dry
12 ounces Muenster cheese
2. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet. Add the onion and sauté until tender.
3. Add the thawed, drained spinach to the skillet and cook until any excess moisture evaporates; let it cool.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the eggs, shredded Muenster cheese, salt, and pepper.
5. Stir the egg mixture into the cooled spinach mixture.
6. Pour the filling into a greased 9-inch pie plate.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until set.
YIELD: One 9-inch Quiche.
